translated: Seeing Liella! perform in Ibaraki, which is both my hometown and the Onitsuka sisters' hometown, was one of my dreams.

When I saw the announcement, my emotions exploded so much I almost screamed at work. Hitachi Seaside Park is full of memories for me, from school trips to BBQs with family and friends, so I'm so happy to make new memories there with Liella!.
I'm looking forward to having the best time ever with everyone in Liella! this summer.
Next is from Liella name: Takashi from Sendai. Thank you.
Congratulations on performing at LuckyFes! Since it's in Ibaraki, the home of the Onitsuka sisters, it must feel extra special.
Since it's a summer festival, please sweep the venue up in a whirlwind of excitement with your hot performance! I'm also excited to see if you'll perform any classic summer songs.
Oh, I'd love to hear about your enthusiasm for the festival or if there's anything specific you want to try doing at a summer fest!
Yes, Liella! will be performing at LuckyFes on Day 2, the 15th.
We've officially been confirmed to appear!
It's great that it's in Ibaraki. You must be so happy.
